title: Decision: is_private_host IPv6-mapped address check is correct
description: The is_private_host() function in server.rs correctly handles IPv6-mapped IPv4 addresses (::ffff:x.x.x.x) via to_ipv4_mapped(), and covers ULA (fc00::/7) and link-local (fe80::/10). The AWS metadata endpoint (169.254.x.x) is explicitly checked. The hostname blocklist (localhost, .local, .internal) is a reasonable defense-in-depth layer. No issues found in this function.
close_reason: All pass 4 fixes applied: media SSRF+size guard, mime/format consistency, proper keyId parsing, fail-closed sig verify, path reconstruction, key owner validation, media cap, blocking stdin fix, conflicts_with
